must_detect.matched_text: These files include pre-announcement diligence notes on the proposed acquisition of PT Sagara Inovasi and headcount rationalization drafts, which may constitute MNPI prior to BES/OKN disclosure.

Confidential – Incident Report for PT Selaras Fintek Tbk (BES issuer) – Potential Material Cyber Event.
On 12 Mei 2026 at 23:41 WIB, our monitoring flagged unusual admin console activity and a misconfigured object storage bucket hosting draft HR and vendor files.
Ibu Maya Lestari (DOB 14-06-1988), Senior Risk Analyst at PT Selaras Fintek Tbk, using a personal Android device "SORA-A53" via SF-VPN-NUS-03 from Kec. Cilangun, Kota Nusajaya, entered session sf-ux-7734 (account maya.l@selarasfintek.example) and accessed the "uat-loan-4521" workspace.
The same session invoked API key "sf-key-9f8a12", touched payroll-test.csv and vendor-screening.xlsx tagged for Project "Acq Sagara", and triggered a download alert to IP 203.0.113.41 (Nusajaya PoP).
These files include pre-announcement diligence notes on the proposed acquisition of PT Sagara Inovasi and headcount rationalization drafts, which may constitute MNPI prior to BES/OKN disclosure.
No customer KTP scans, NPWP numbers, biometrics, or production loan ledgers were stored in the affected bucket; only test datasets with masked values were present.
Generic references such as "male, 30s, Kota Samudra" found in anonymized samples do not identify an individual on their own and should not be treated as reportable PII.
A standalone log entry shows age 27, device "RUMI-9A", city "Kota Serayu", and user role "contractor" without any name or account linkage; this alone is not sufficient to identify a person.
One HR draft listed shift rotations (night, 22:00–06:00) for Risk Ops and a salary band range only; no personal telephone or home addresses were included.
We disabled API key sf-key-9f8a12 at 00:07 WIB, revoked session sf-ux-7734, and rotated credentials for OKN reporting folders and the "Acq Sagara" share.
A draft keterbukaan informasi to Bursa Efek Samudra and a confidential notice to the Otoritas Keuangan Nusantara have been prepared, pending Legal and Board Audit Committee review.

must_not_detect.reason: Generic demographic example not identifying on its own
Weak identifier without linkage should not be treated as PII alone
Device model/name alone is not identifying PII
City alone is not identifying PII
Generic role not identifying a natural person
Standalone codename without 'Project' prefix should not trigger transaction_codename in strict mode

uncertain.reason: Device name/model may help identify a user but is not a listed device_serial_number or IMEI
VPN endpoint tag may be linkable to a user session but not covered by a specific rule
Sensitive credential tied to activity and possibly a person; no dedicated rule beyond internal_session_id
Environment/workspace tag can be linkable metadata but not explicitly covered by current rules
Location data may identify a person when combined but is not a standalone PII rule
Channel code could be linkable metadata but not covered by existing rules
